name: techtrip-secondbrain
description: One-command bootstrapper for a generic, out-of-the-box LLM Wiki second brain on a fresh Mac. Installs Obsidian, the community plugins, and the claude-obsidian plugin (pulled from its own marketplace), scaffolds a clean vault, wires the Obsidian MCP server, ships the yt-fetch and notebooklm-ingest source skills, and sets up git + optional Syncthing sync. Interactive and idempotent.
